plugin_desc: Teltonika 工业蜂窝路由器专用 SNMP 采集模板（RutOS 基于 Linux + net-snmp，HOST-RESOURCES / UCD-SNMP-MIB，企业号 48690）。除标准 IF-MIB 64 位 HC 接口流量外，额外采集 RutOS 经标准 net-snmp 暴露的设备健康指标：CPU 使用率（HOST-RESOURCES hrProcessorLoad，每核 0-100%，取整机均值）、物理内存（总量 + 空闲，KB，已用由 总量 − 空闲 推导，用量按 100×（总量−空闲）/总量 推导）。Teltonika RUT 系列蜂窝路由器为无风扇紧凑型工业设计且未以标量形式暴露温度/电源传感器，故温度/风扇/电源为 N/A。适用品牌型号——Teltonika RUT / TRB / RUTX 工业 4G/5G 蜂窝路由器（RutOS，企业号 48690）。
name: Router

metrics.name: device_cpu_usage
metrics.description: CPU utilisation of the Teltonika cellular router (HOST-RESOURCES hrProcessorLoad, averaged across cores).

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes received over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCInOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric calculates the average rate of bytes sent over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCOutOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: device_memory_total
metrics.description: Total physical memory of the Teltonika cellular router in bytes (UCD memTotalReal, KB*1024).

metrics.name: device_memory_free
metrics.description: Available physical memory of the Teltonika cellular router in bytes (UCD memAvailReal, KB*1024).

metrics.name: device_memory_used
metrics.description: Used physical memory of the Teltonika cellular router in bytes (memTotalReal - memAvailReal, KB*1024).

metrics.name: device_memory_usage
metrics.description: Memory utilisation of the Teltonika cellular router, derived as 100*(total-free)/total.
